generated_oml:
instance AECOEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain environment for buildings and infrastructure assets"
    base:contains BCSSensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensor for real-time environmental data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSDataStream
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component in Building Control Systems for controlling physical infrastructure"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller component in Building Control Systems for managing system operations"
]

instance BCSDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSRealTimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data streams from Building Control Systems components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSDataStream
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model for device modeling of Building Control Systems components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for transforming enriched BIM models into structured DT artifacts for automated deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance DataIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange enabler for synchronizing physical BCS components with digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for operational status"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateInsight, SystemStateVisualization
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for equipment failure detection and maintenance planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides FailurePredictionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of building operations for energy efficiency and performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance SystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for system operational status"
]

instance SystemStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interface for Facility Managers to monitor and operate physical infrastructure"
]

instance FailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights on potential equipment failures to enable proactive maintenance"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing energy consumption and operational efficiency of building systems"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs a model-driven framework with a layered system architecture where the DT Framework acts as a central hub for coordination between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises three primary stages: (1) Initial device modeling within BIM environment where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to establish a unified semantic foundation; (2) Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation of enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention; and (3) Runtime operation featuring real-time data exchange for synchronization between physical and digital twins, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and integration of custom services via modular architecture. Governance is role-based, with Building Control Engineers handling modeling, Facility Managers operating the system, and DT Engineers extending functionality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to evaluate the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart for validity verification. Semantic drift, defined as the divergence of digital model alignment from physical counterparts over time, is a key uncertainty source requiring ongoing monitoring and correction."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange and ensures interoperability across heterogeneous systems through standardized protocols."
]
